description_long: This object is a compact shotgun with a short barrel and a robust, utilitarian design. The receiver and barrel are finished in a dark, matte metal, while the grip and fore-end are covered in a textured blue material, likely rubber or polymer, for improved handling. The stock is absent, replaced by a pistol grip that is ergonomically shaped and wrapped for comfort and control. The pump-action mechanism is clearly visible beneath the barrel, with a tubular magazine running parallel to the barrel. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, providing protection for the trigger while allowing easy access. Overall, the shotgun has a rugged, tactical appearance suitable for close-quarters use in urban environments.
description: A compact, pump-action shotgun with a blue pistol grip, short barrel, and matte metal finish, designed for tactical use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the blue pistol grip, wooden receiver, and the full length of the short barrel and pump.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening and the alignment of the pump and grip beneath.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the blue grip, wooden receiver, and the pump-action mechanism.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the blue pistol grip and the back of the receiver, with the barrel receding away.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, short barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no finger grooves
